entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: Pennisetum americanum, the host crop susceptible to ergot infection

entities.name: ERGOT
entities.description: A fungal disease caused by Claviceps fusiformis that affects the inflorescences of pearl millet

entities.name: CLAVICEPS FUSIFORMIS
entities.description: The fungus that causes ergot infection in pearl millet

entities.name: POLLINATION
entities.description: The process of transferring pollen to the stigma to induce fertilization and subsequent physiological changes

entities.name: INOCULATION
entities.description: The artificial introduction of Claviceps fusiformis conidia into the plant inflorescences

entities.name: MALE STERILITY
entities.description: The inability of a plant line to produce functional pollen

entities.name: STIGMA
entities.description: The receptive part of the flower through which ergot infection occurs

entities.name: STIGMA WITHERING
entities.description: The rapid drying and degradation of the stigma induced by pollination

entities.name: ERGOT SUSCEPTIBILITY
entities.description: The degree to which a plant variety is prone to ergot infection

entities.name: F1 HYBRIDS
entities.description: First-generation hybrid varieties of pearl millet

entities.name: RESISTANCE SCREENING
entities.description: The process of evaluating plant lines for their ability to resist ergot infection

entities.name: CULTURAL CONTROL
entities.description: Agricultural management practices used to reduce the incidence of ergot

entities.name: PROTOGYNY
entities.description: The condition where the stigma becomes receptive before the pollen is released

entities.name: EARLY FLOWERING
entities.description: The characteristic of flowering earlier in the growth cycle to avoid infection

entities.name: SUCROSE SOLUTION
entities.description: A 10% solution used to incubate pollen and conidia for germination tests

entities.name: POLLEN GERMINATION
entities.description: The process of pollen grains sprouting a tube upon incubation

entities.name: CONIDIA GERMINATION
entities.description: The process of fungal spores sprouting upon incubation
